title: Wojciech Jaśkowski
text: Home * People * Wojciech Jaśkowski Wojciech Jaśkowski [1] Wojciech Jaśkowski , a Polish computer scientist and researcher with Jürgen Schmidhuber at NNAISENSE [2] , until 2017 assistant professor at the Institute of Computing Science, Poznań University of Technology , where he already defended his Ph.D. thesis in 2011, devoted to a subclass of optimization problems applied to learning game strategies and combinatorial optimizations [3] [4] . His research interests include genetic programming , coevolutionary algorithms , evolutionary computation , reinforcement learning , and pattern recognition , using the game of Othello as testbed.
